raw.objective: “to investigate the influence of specific genetic variants of UGT1A4 and UGT2B7, along with non-genetic factors, including age, weight, co-medications, gender, liver function, and renal function, on lamotrigine pharmacokinetics”
raw.covariates: Tested: AGE, WT, COMEDS, SEX, genotype on CL Included: enzyme inducers, VPA, UGT genotype
raw.observations: UGT2B7 genotype accounted for part of variability in clearance.
raw.structure: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination
raw.equations: CL/F=theta1*(1+theta2*IDC)*(1+theta3*VPA)*(1+theta4*UGT2B7161CT) *exp(eta1) Ka=theta1 Vd/F=theta2 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1)+eps2 IDC is 0 for no inducing comedication and 1 for use of inducing comedication (CBZ, PHT, oral contraceptives) VPA: comedication with valproate (yes =1, no=0) UGT2B7161CT is 0 for UGT2B7-161CT or TT genotype and 1 for UGT2B7-161CC genotype
raw.parameter_values: theta1=2.49 theta2=1.04 theta3=-0.41 theta4=-0.18 theta5=1.3 theta6=156 omega1=0.04904 sigma1=0.06817 sigma2=0.18

extraction_target.title: Influence of the UGT2B7 -161C>T polymorphism on the population pharmacokinetics of lamotrigine in Thai patients.

structural_model.description: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL/F=theta1*(1+theta2*IDC)*(1+theta3*VPA)*(1+theta4*UGT2B7161CT) *exp(eta1) Ka=theta1 Vd/F=theta2 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1)+eps2 IDC is 0 for no inducing comedication and 1 for use of inducing comedication (CBZ, PHT, oral contraceptives) VPA: comedication with valproate (yes =1, no=0) UGT2B7161CT is 0 for UGT2B7-161CT or TT genotype and 1 for UGT2B7-161CC genotype
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to investigate the influence of specific genetic variants of UGT1A4 and UGT2B7, along with non-genetic factors, including age, weight, co-medications, gender, liver function, and renal function, on lamotrigine pharmacokinetics”

covariates.raw: Tested: AGE, WT, COMEDS, SEX, genotype on CL Included: enzyme inducers, VPA, UGT genotype

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
